name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-powered presentation builder that produces polished decks without the generic, over-designed AI aesthetic.
problem: Most AI presentation tools generate visually cluttered or templated slides that look immediately generic, undermining credibility. Chronicle 2.0 addresses this by giving teams AI assistance that enhances rather than overrides their design sensibility. The result is faster deck creation without sacrificing the professional quality stakeholders expect.
useCases: Building investor pitch decks with clean, credible design
Creating client-facing proposals and sales presentations
Producing internal strategy or roadmap decks quickly
Repurposing written reports into structured slide narratives
